name: Warcraft instant simple workflow + beads-aligned manual tasks

description: Baseline setup attempt: added autoresearch harness and instant-workflow eval, but the benchmark crashed because eval/instant-workflow-score.ts imported warcraft-core via an unresolved package name.

Baseline: added autoresearch harness and a behavior-oriented instant-workflow eval. Current score is 1/5: status can continue manual tasks without a plan, but feature creation guidance, instant workflow promotion, self-contained manual specs, and prompt/system guidance are still missing.

Add an instant workflow for tiny tasks: manual task creation now accepts self-contained descriptions, auto-promotes no-plan features into workflowPath=instant/executing, manual specs fall back to the task brief, prompts/system/docs explain when to skip plans, and status can recommend the direct-task path.

name: Warcraft instant workflow + beads-native brief persistence

description: First v2 baseline attempt broadened the benchmark with a beads-mode persistence check, but the mock repository bypassed the real encode/decode path, so the 6/6 score was not trustworthy. Discarding this benchmark shape and fixing the workload before evaluating improvements.

Corrected the v2 benchmark to exercise the real beads encode/decode path, revealing a true 5/6 baseline. Discarding this run only to clear the contaminated prior v2 baseline; re-initialize the experiment next with the corrected workload.

name: Warcraft instant workflow + beads-native brief persistence (corrected workload)

description: Reset the v2 workload with a corrected beads-mode persistence check that exercises the real artifact encode/decode path. Trustworthy baseline is now 5/6: the remaining gap is that beads-backed manual tasks lose their self-contained brief during decode/readback.
